title: A002: Implement shared test infrastructure
summary: Review of changes addressing sourcery-ai[bot] feedback (review #2). All three external review comments are fully addressed: (1) EventuallyCondition now validates Timeout/Interval > 0 and fails on non-NotFound Get errors instead of silently continuing, with 3 new tests. (2) SetupEnvTest passes SharedScheme() to client.New, fixes double-stop by registering t.Cleanup only after client.New succeeds, and centralizes the skip guard as exported SkipIfEnvTestUnavailable. (3) SecretBuilder.WithLabels/WithAnnotations defensively copy caller-provided maps, with 3 new tests verifying isolation. All 35 unit tests pass. golangci-lint and go vet are clean.

tests_checklist.item: Unit tests exist and pass (35 tests: 20 assertions + 15 builders)
Integration tests properly skip without KUBEBUILDER_ASSETS
Edge cases covered (zero interval, zero timeout, non-NotFound errors, nil maps, map mutation)
Error paths tested (validation failures, missing resources, wrong conditions)
New tests specifically cover each external review comment

code_quality_checklist.item: Follows existing code patterns (fluent builder, skip guard, unstructured patching)
No code duplication — skip guard centralized into single exported function
Functions are focused and small (≤20 lines)
Go doc comments on all exported functions
No dead code or commented-out code

security_checklist.item: gosec G703 on SkipIfEnvTestUnavailable is false positive (env var for test infra, not user input)

architecture_checklist.item: SharedScheme uses sync.Once for thread-safe lazy initialization
t.Cleanup registration moved after client.New to prevent double env.Stop()
SkipIfEnvTestUnavailable accepts testing.TB for broad compatibility
Solution is minimal — only changes requested by external review

dry_yagni_checklist.item: Duplicated skip guards removed from envtest/integration_test.go and simulators/integration_test.go

fail_fast_checklist.item: EventuallyCondition validates Interval > 0 before creating ticker (prevents panic)
EventuallyCondition validates Timeout > 0 before creating deadline
Non-NotFound Get errors fail immediately instead of silently continuing

defensive_checklist.item: WithLabels/WithAnnotations copy maps to prevent caller mutation of builder state
WithLabels(nil) properly clears labels without NPE
Build() returns deep copy preventing cross-test mutation

suggested_improvements: D4 (minor): The envtest-skip-guard-pattern.md (.planwerk/patterns/) is stale — it still shows two separate unexported skip guards (skipIfEnvTestUnavailable and skipIfNoEnvTest) as examples, but the code now has a single centralized exported SkipIfEnvTestUnavailable. Update the pattern file to reflect the centralized approach.

D4 (minor): The fluent-builder-with-deepcopy-isolation.md pattern could be updated to document the defensive map-copying convention established by WithLabels/WithAnnotations, since future builders (KeystoneBuilder, ControlPlaneBuilder) should follow the same practice.
